title: USB Auto Detect
subtitle: Automatic USB device detection utility
description: A utility for detecting USB device connections and triggering related actions when drives are inserted or removed.
Designed to simplify workflows that depend on removable storage being recognized automatically.
features: Automatic detection of connected USB devices
Trigger-ready workflow for insert and removal events
Designed to support automation tied to removable media
statusDetails: Trigger behavior and supported actions may expand
Project details have not been fully documented yet
